phases.name: Problem
phases.note: Pick a niche where a specific avatar has a painful, monetizable problem. Validate demand before building anything.

tasks.title: Shortlist 5–10 candidate niches
tasks.notes:
# Candidate Niches — v2 (2026-07-08)

## Survivors
1. Migration tools -> reframe as document organizer / visa timeline planner (never "advice")
2. Research thesis planner (Notion)
3. Claude skills for university (merge into #14)
4. Male outfit planner -> only viable sharpened: capsule wardrobe for professional men
5. Tax planner Australia * TOP PICK
6. Financial planner for small service business Brazil * TOP PICK
7. Claude content skill (park until a niche gives you proof)

## New — Australia money edge
8. Side-hustle tax kit (gig drivers, Etsy, creators): deduction tracker + EOFY checklist
9. Tradie ops pack: quoting, job pricing, invoice chase-ups (the HVAC analog)
10. NDIS support-worker business kit: ABN, insurance, invoicing, compliance checklists
11. Airbnb / short-stay host ops + tax pack
12. Cleaning-business startup kit: contracts, pricing, police check, first 10 clients

## New — Brazil edge
13. MEI survival kit: DAS, nota fiscal, cash flow, when to outgrow MEI
14. Freelancer cobranca system: pricing scripts, late-payment recovery, PIX flows
15. Remote work for foreign companies (PT-BR): contracts, invoicing abroad, exchange basics
16. Service pricing packs for creatives: photographers, makeup artists, confeiteiras

## New — Cross-border (unique to you)
17. Brazilians-in-Australia money starter kit: TFN/ABN, super, tax by visa, sending money home
18. International student finance kit (AU): banking, work-hour rules, first-year budget
19. Skilled-migration evidence organizer: points prep, document checklist, timeline

## New — Claude / knowledge
20. Thesis-with-Claude system: lit review, notes pipeline, chapter drafting (merges 2+3)
21. Claude skills for consultants/coaches: productize what they already know
22. Faceless-page engine: prompt packs + SOPs (v2 of #7, only after proof)

Next: score all on pain x purchasing power x reachability. Validate 5, 6, 17 first.

subtasks.title: Check search + social demand per niche
Score each niche: pain × purchasing power × reachability

tasks.title: Define the exact avatar for top niche

subtasks.title: Who are they, what do they do daily
What outcome do they want in 90 days
Where do they hang out online

tasks.title: Write the core problem statement (1 sentence)
Validate: 10 conversations / DMs / comments confirming the pain
Decide niche #1 — commit

phases.name: Product Development
phases.note: Build the smallest product that fully solves the stated problem: template pack, system, or short course.

tasks.title: Choose product format (templates / course / system doc)
Outline the product end-to-end

subtasks.title: Draft with AI, edit with judgment

tasks.title: Build v1 of the product
Create the lead magnet (free slice of the product)
Price it — decide front-end price + order bump
Get 3 beta users through it, collect testimonials

phases.name: Product Distribution
phases.note: Where the product lives and how buyers find it: sales page, funnel, email list.

tasks.title: Write the sales page (hook, pain, proof, offer, CTA)
Set up email capture → welcome sequence
Set up the funnel: content → lead magnet → email → offer
Add proof: testimonials, results, screenshots

phases.name: Content Distribution
phases.note: The faceless content engine. AI generates volume, you filter for quality — post the best 30%.

tasks.title: Create the faceless account(s) for niche #1
Define voice + 3 proven post structures

subtasks.title: Analyze 5 winning posts in the niche

tasks.title: Build the weekly content pipeline
Post daily for 30 days — no gaps
Weekly review: double down on what got reach

phases.name: Ads
phases.note: Paid amplification only after organic proves the message. Small tests, kill fast, scale winners.

tasks.title: Set a test budget + max cost per lead
Turn 3 best organic posts into ad creatives
Launch first test campaign (traffic → lead magnet)
Track CPL / CTR / conversion — kill losers in 72h
Scale the winning creative

phases.name: Checkout
phases.note: The money path: payment, delivery, bumps. Every click of friction costs sales.

tasks.title: Set up payment processor + checkout page
Add order bump / upsell
Automate product delivery on purchase
Test the full buying flow yourself on mobile
Set up abandoned-checkout email

phases.name: Automation
phases.note: Systemize everything repeatable so a page runs on ~2h/week — that’s what makes multiple pages possible.

tasks.title: Document the SOP for one page (content → funnel → sales)
Automate scheduling + email flows
Build a weekly metrics snapshot (revenue, leads, reach)
Decide: optimize page #1 vs launch page #2
